records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when a public authority or recognised race operator publishes a stable current meeting calendar.
records.blocked_reason: The reviewed government law index does not provide a current horse-racing calendar or approved date-and-venue rows.
limitations: The evidence is legal and archival rather than a current meeting source.
No current racecourse or meeting date is approved.
Historical references must not generate present calendar rows.
records.notes: Keep this country outside current-calendar output until a current official meeting source is verified.
